description: This pipeline performs image processing by first overlaying greyscale or RGB images, and then copying physical pixel sizes from a source to a target, allowing for the grouping of incoming data based on annotations and processing of multiple data items per slot.

920f5f76-6bc5-4190-a754-29d451ccc2ea.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
920f5f76-6bc5-4190-a754-29d451ccc2ea.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

9874bb88-95f1-4af4-95a1-14befe8f196b.name: ij1-color-blend-images
9874bb88-95f1-4af4-95a1-14befe8f196b.description:
Overlays greyscale or RGB images.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
